summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/04/2024
DCE iron ore futures rose largely today. The main contract I2409 closed at 888. anincrease of 3.08% throughout the day; some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills purchased on demand.
